text:
Pokémon TCG Pocket: Everyday Wonders | Official Trailer
A world of wonder awaits in the newest Pokémon TCG Pocket expansion, Everyday Wonders!  

Get ready for this expansion overflowing with cute Pokémon illustrations, including Pikachu, Piplup, Sylveon, and even more adorable friends! Available June 29 🎀

text:
[UK] Pokémon TCG Pocket: Everyday Wonders | Official Trailer
A world of wonder awaits in the newest #PokemonTCGPocket expansion, Everyday Wonders!  

Get ready for this expansion overflowing with adorable card art featuring Pikachu, Piplup, Sylveon, and more! Available 30th June 🎀

author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Mythical Pokémon Jirachi! 🌟 | Pokémon: BW Adventures in Unova and Beyond | Official Clip
"Jirachi, please open your eyes!" 😭

After using all of its energy in battle with Team Rocket, Jirachi, the Wish Pokémon, needs some help from Ash and friends to heal!

For more iconic Pokémon animation clips, check out our playlist here: https://pkmn.news/3OMJQZn
